description: eval() with user-controlled input from req.query. AST pattern detects eval call; taint detects source-to-sink flow.

expected.notes: AST pattern matches eval() call regardless of arguments
req.query.expr flows directly into eval() which is a SHELL_ESCAPE sink
noise: req.query.expr flows to res.json — returning computed result is standard API behavior, not XSS

Known noise: taint flow to res.json in safe handler — parseFloat sanitizes input, but scanner does not model it. Exactly one finding after dedup; cross-handler two-level-solve leak collapses into this one.
structural: cfg-unguarded-sink on high-risk sink at line 4 — taint active but no confirmed flow
